channel.title: golang on Developer Blog
channel.description: Recent content in golang on Developer Blog

item.title: Golang Tools
item.description: This page group resource all tool related golang maybe you need it Release version in golang: https://goreleaser.com/quick-start/ Host static resource in a binary https://github.com/rakyll/statik Go-mansory Go-Fx

item.title: Chapter I: golang
item.description: Install Golang Windows Go to website and download the latest Golang version: https://go.dev/doc/install Install Setting GOPATH Environment Environmental Variables under Control Panel > System and Security > System > Advanced Settings > Environmental Variables Syntax Each Statement ends with a line break. To comment block code /* This is block comment in go */ Comment line // This is single line comment Variable var variable-name datatype = value Condition if(condition) { //code block to be executed when if condition evaluates to true } Switch Case
